title: Driver source inventory and provenance freeze
acceptance: Every imported driver adaptor and tool is inventoried with source path destination category language build system and required status

title: Build artifact isolation policy
acceptance: Every ecosystem has an assigned build cache dependency package and test output path under build/

title: Path realignment backlog
acceptance: All absolute legacy old driver track and source-root assumptions are found classified and assigned to remediation

title: Toolchain and dependency policy
acceptance: Required optional waiver and download/cache behavior is defined for every language and adaptor ecosystem

title: Common driver conformance matrix
acceptance: Connect auth prepare execute fetch transaction metadata type error reconnect protocol and cancellation coverage is defined for every actual driver

title: CTest driver gate matrix
acceptance: Every driver adaptor and tool has required CTest labels target ownership skip policy and evidence output paths

title: Server fixture lifecycle policy
acceptance: CTest fixture start stop port database socket log timeout and cleanup behavior is defined under build/

title: Benchmark and Execution_Plan 10 readiness policy
acceptance: Execution_Plan 10 and benchmark outputs must use current repo drivers and write result JSON under build/benchmarks/

title: Packaging install and release claim policy
acceptance: Each driver adaptor and tool has distributable build install smoke and release status criteria

title: Static hygiene and source-tree write policy
acceptance: Generated artifacts caches binaries old paths and source-tree writes are fatal unless explicitly historical reference

title: CMake driver orchestration substrate
acceptance: CMake can discover or explicitly register driver adaptor and tool gates without enabling all toolchains by default

title: Build directory layout implementation
acceptance: All language build systems are redirected to build/drivers/{driver|adaptor|tool}/{name}/

title: Dependency cache redirection
outputs: dependency cache wrappers and env templates
acceptance: Package managers download and cache dependencies under build/drivers/_deps or fail with clear diagnostics

title: Old path and source-tree write gates
outputs: old path scanner;source-tree write guard CTest target
acceptance: CTest fails on old external path usage generated artifact writes or changed source tree after driver tests

outputs: package build scripts and install smoke CTest wrappers

acceptance: Static hygiene gate fails on source-tree caches binaries old paths missing labels and unsupported release claims

acceptance: drivers_all and ctest -L driver_tool_adaptor_gate pass every required driver adaptor tool server fixture conformance packaging benchmark-readiness and hygiene gate

acceptance: Docs list every driver adaptor tool with build command CTest label artifact root toolchain status and release claim

title: Final zero-drift audit
acceptance: drivers_final_zero_drift_audit passes with zero old-path hits zero source-tree outputs zero missing required labels zero unsupported claims and current-source P5 live fixture evidence
